hero.title: Turn PDFs and images into EPUB
hero.subtitle: Upload a PDF or a set of screenshots. We run OCR and structure the content into a clean, readable EPUB file.

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Drop a PDF or images (PNG, JPG, WebP) into the upload zone.

step2.title: We process
step2.desc: Our OCR pipeline extracts text, preserves structure, and builds the EPUB.

step3.title: Download
step3.desc: Pay for the pages processed and download your EPUB immediately.

upload.heading: Upload your file
upload.dropPrompt: Drag & drop a PDF or images here

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.paymentNote: Payment via Stripe after processing. No account required.
